name: Rice and Cheese Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the cooked brown rice, green onions, low-fat milk, low-fat cottage cheese, dill weed, and freshly grated Parmesan.
2. Pour the mixture into a casserole dish coated with nonstick vegetable spray.
3. Bake in a preheated 350 degree Fahrenheit oven for 15 to 20 minutes.
4. Serves: 6 (serving size: 3/4 cup). Calories: 225, Protein: 14 g, Fat: 4 g, Carbohydrates: 34 g, Fiber: 2.5 g, Cholesterol: 10 mg, Sodium: 328 mg, Potassium: 218 mg.
Exchange: 1 1/2 starch/bread, 1/2 lean meat, 1 low-fat milk.
